ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course is offered */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year when the course is offered */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course(s) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "learning_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected learning outcomes of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_id") REFERENCES prerequisites ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_semester FOREIGN KEY ("semester") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course detail entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "lecture_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lecture hours per week */,
  "tutorial_hours" INTEGER /* Number of tutorial hours per week */,
  "practical_hours" INTEGER /* Number of practical hours per week */,
  "assessment_methods" TEXT /* Methods used to assess student learning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_details_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the prerequisite requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the semester */,
  "semester_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "semester_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Name of the faculty leading the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g. active, inactive, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major subject of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the classroom */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the classroom */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g. lecture, tutorial, laboratory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review of the course */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the course (e.g. 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
